diagrams.title: printf() Function Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the components of a printf() statement with format specifiers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how printf() formats and displays output with variable substitution

diagrams.title: scanf() Function Structure
diagrams.description: Illustrates how scanf() reads input using format specifiers and stores at memory addresses
elements: Format string (%d), Address-of operator (&), Variable (num), Memory location
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how scanf() writes input data into variables by knowing their memory addresses
